episodes.title: Senator Megan Hunt: Prosecute All Epstein Offenders, No Matter the Party
episodes.description:
The crimes of Jeffrey Epstein are abhorrent, and expose a deep sickness in the highest levels of our government. 

Lest we forget, our current President called him his "best friend" and sent him a lewd birthday card describing their "wonderful secret". Yet, Trump and his supporters will say they support women and prosecuting abusers, all while protecting the co-conspirators of the most notorious sexual abuser and human trafficker in our nation's history. 

And Bill Clinton? Throw him in jail too! I don't care what political party you are a member of or what ideology you subscribe to, these crimes are inexcusable. We have all the evidence, now it is time to act and arrest those individuals implicated in the Epstein Files.
